name: Tat Atarer
description: Captain of the Dragon Knights -- a hardened, pragmatic mercenary commander who serves Baron Hanzo for pay, not ideology. Master fighter (combat 97%); 'the Baron pays for our swords, not our opinions.'
narrative: Tat Atarer is the military commander of Baron Hanzo's Dragon Knights -- a former mercenary captain, professional and disciplined, motivated by money and security rather than any ideological commitment to the Baron's dark schemes. A peerless veteran fighter (combat style 97%, Unarmed 87, resistances at 80), he leads from the front and keeps his men in line. His creed: 'The Baron pays for our swords, not our opinions.'

equipment.name: Light armor (all locations)
equipment.notes: AP 3 each location; no armor penalty

extras.class_note: Veteran mercenary captain; master Fighter (combat 97). Fighter talents (from sheet notes): Agile Defender, Combat Proficiency (+5% Combat Style), Weapon Specialization (+10% with specialised weapon; +1 Action Point for Parrying), Weapon Master (+ a 1-step damage-modifier improvement).
extras.role: Military commander of the Dragon Knights; serves Baron Hanzo for pay, not ideology; pragmatic, professional, values discipline.
extras.quote: The Baron pays for our swords, not our opinions.
abilities: Weapon Specialization (+10% with specialised weapon; +1 AP for Parry)
extras.armor: Light armor, AP 3 on all 7 locations; no armor penalty
extras.sheet_cleanup_note: EXCLUDED as held-over template/download error (NOT Tat's data; he is a sword-for-hire, not a caster, per source): the magic professional skills Folk Magic 84, Exhort 100, Devotion 100, Storm Speech 87 and the 'Folk Magic' tradition (rank 1). Kept his martial/mercenary skills as captured; note Lore (Cult) 95 / Lore (World) 92 are high for INT 9 and may also be template-inflated -- trim to taste.
extras.source: Roll20 Classic Fantasy character sheet (And then the Dragons Came campaign)
